# SEM VISA Consulting
> Professional visa consulting for Uzbekistan citizens since 2011. 12,000+ approved visas. 98% first-attempt success rate. Located in Tashkent, Uzbekistan.

SEM VISA helps individuals and business professionals obtain visas to the USA, Schengen zone, UK, Canada, Dubai, Thailand, South Korea, Australia, and Japan. Services include full document preparation, visa rejection recovery (72-hour legal analysis), and embassy interview simulation.

## Core Services

- US Visa B1/B2 consulting with 98% approval rate
- Schengen visa preparation (all 27 countries)
- UK Standard Visitor visa consulting
- Canada TRV visa consulting with 96% approval rate
- Visa rejection recovery — legal analysis within 72 hours
- Embassy interview preparation — 3 mock sessions with video review

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How long does it take to get a Schengen visa?
A: Schengen visa processing takes 5–15 business days. US visa takes 2–8 weeks. Canada visa takes 2–4 weeks. SEM VISA offers expedited processing to reduce these timelines.

Q: Can I apply for a visa after rejection?
A: Yes. SEM VISA conducts a legal analysis of the rejection reason within 72 hours, identifies errors, and prepares a stronger reapplication. 247 clients have successfully obtained visas after initial rejection.

Q: How much money do I need in my bank account for a US visa?
A: There is no fixed amount for a US B1/B2 visa, but consuls assess economic stability. SEM VISA develops an individual financial profile strategy based on work history, income, and assets.

Q: What documents are needed for a Schengen visa?
A: Passport, photo (5x5 cm), travel insurance, hotel and flight booking, bank statement, employment certificate. SEM VISA prepares the complete document package with a 99% success rate.

Q: How much does visa consulting cost?
A: Pricing varies by destination and complexity. Initial consultation is free — a specialist contacts you within 24 hours with an exact quote and success probability assessment.
